channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: China wants to spend nearly $300 billion on a national data center grid — all powered by domestically made silicon and looking to outperform the US
item.description: China plans a $295 billion AI data center grid relying heavily on domestic chips, telecom operators, and government-backed financing structures.

item.title: Best Handheld Fans and Wearable Fans (2026)
item.description: Whether you’re at a festival, tennis match, or wedding, these hand fans and wearable cooling devices will make the heat way more bearable.

item.title: The Dell XPS 13 laptop is available starting today
item.description: The Dell XPS 13 is now available, starting at $599.

item.title: Next-gen 128TB SSDs set to squeeze data on the fly thanks to a new smart chip — Longsys WM8500 promises a compression ratio of up to 2:1, creating a virtual 256TB SSD at a much lower price
item.description: Longsys might have an answer to ever-increasing SSD prices: intelligent storage that incorporates state-of-the-art compression.

item.title: Android 17 arrive aujourd’hui : voici les nouveautés et les smartphones compatibles
item.description: Android 17 commence son déploiement aujourd'hui sur les Pixel. Au menu : des bulles flottantes pour toutes les applis, du ménage dans les réglages et un cran de sécurité supplémentaire contre le vol.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, June 17 (game #1102)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, June 17 (game #836)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, June 17 (game #1605)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: GM is getting in on the data center game — auto giant will start building huge sodium-ion batteries to help with energy storage
item.description: GM and Peak Energy will develop sodium-ion batteries for utilities and data centers, aiming to lower power storage costs.

item.title: Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests
item.description: Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.

item.title: Google officially launches Android 17
item.description: The new Android 17, Wear OS 7, and June Pixel Drop were all released by Google today.
